things.name: Novosibirsk Opera and Ballet Theatre
things.description: Russia's largest opera and ballet theatre in a striking neo-Classical building

things.name: Novosibirsk Zoo
things.description: One of Russia's top zoos with 700+ species including the famous white tigers and snow leopards

things.name: Akademgorodok (Science City)
things.description: Soviet-era academic city in the taiga forest, home to the Siberian Branch of the Russian Academy of Sciences

things.name: Novosibirsk State Art Museum
things.description: Regional art collection with Russian academic painting and Siberian folk art

things.name: Trans-Siberian Railway Museum
things.description: Museum at the original 1897 Novosibirsk station on the world's longest railway

things.name: Ob Sea Beach
things.description: Vast man-made Ob reservoir beach known as the 'Siberian Sea' for summer swimming

things.name: Chapel of St Nicholas
things.description: Restored chapel marking the geographical centre of Russia at the foot of the main bridge

things.name: Lenin Square
things.description: Central Soviet-era square with the Stalin-era regional government building and the Novosibirsk banner

things.name: Museum of the Sun
things.description: Unique private collection of sun symbols from cultures around the world

things.name: Berdsk Beach & Ob Forests
things.description: Sandy pine forest beaches south of the city on the Ob reservoir
